features.name: auth-system
features.title: Аутентификация и авторизация
features.description: Регистрация, логин, JWT httpOnly cookies, refresh tokens

features.name: email-accounts
features.title: Управление email-аккаунтами
features.description: Подключение Yandex/Mail.ru/SMTP, тестирование соединения, AES-256 шифрование credentials

features.name: warmup-engine
features.title: Warmup Engine
features.description: Автоматический прогрев email-аккаунтов для Yandex/Mail.ru. Gradual volume increase, peer pool, health monitoring

features.name: lead-management
features.title: Управление лидами
features.description: Импорт CSV, деduplication, статусы лидов, переменные для шаблонов

features.name: ai-email-generation
features.title: AI-генерация писем
features.description: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini интеграция, персонализация per-lead, tone selection, quality guardrails

features.name: email-sequences
features.title: Email Sequences
features.description: Цепочки 3-5 шагов, delay настройки, авто-стоп при ответе, variable substitution

features.name: campaign-management
features.title: Управление кампаниями
features.description: Campaign wizard (4 steps), запуск/пауза/стоп, email scheduler, daily limits

features.name: email-sending
features.title: Email Sending Engine
features.description: SMTP отправка через BullMQ, tracking pixel, click tracking, retry logic

features.name: unibox
features.title: Unified Inbox (Unibox)
features.description: IMAP polling, reply detection, bounce detection, OOO handling, unified interface

features.name: analytics
features.title: Аналитика
features.description: KPI cards (sent/opened/replied/bounced), area chart, per-campaign/per-account metrics, date filter

features.name: compliance-checker
features.title: Compliance Checker (38-ФЗ)
features.description: Проверка текста письма на соответствие 38-ФЗ, предупреждения, opt-out enforcement

features.name: dark-ui-shell
features.title: Frontend UI Shell
features.description: Dark theme React SPA, icon sidebar, secondary sidebar, routing, design tokens from Instantly reference

features.name: amocrm-integration
features.title: AmoCRM Integration
features.description: Bidirectional sync leads/deals, webhook receiver, OAuth2 connection

features.name: ab-testing
features.title: A/B Testing
features.description: Split test subject lines and email bodies, winner auto-selection

features.name: agency-dashboard
features.title: Agency Multi-Client Dashboard
features.description: Workspace/tenant isolation, client-level analytics, team management
